description_long: This is a square pizza box with a pixelated design on the lid, featuring the word 'PIZZA' in bold black letters and a stylized image of a pizza with cheese, red toppings, and a sausage or pepperoni slice. The box is primarily tan with a blue band around the sides, which also displays pixelated pizza graphics and the word 'PIZZA' in blocky letters. The lid artwork includes a cartoonish depiction of a pizza slice and a sausage, rendered in a retro, 8-bit style. The box appears to be made of cardboard, with a flat, hard surface and crisp edges. The overall appearance is clean and simple, with a playful, nostalgic aesthetic reminiscent of classic video games. No visible branding or commercial logos are present on the box.
description: A tan, square pizza box with pixelated pizza graphics and the word 'PIZZA' on the lid, accented by a blue band around the sides. The design is retro and playful, resembling 8-bit video game art.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full lid with 'PIZZA' text and a pixelated pizza and sausage graphic.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue band with pixelated pizza graphics and the word 'PIZZA' along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with the lid's graphics upside down, showing the back edge of the box.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the blue band and pixelated pizza graphics, with the lid art partially visible.
